recommendations.title: Lucy Shimmers and the Prince of Peace
recommendations.overview: Second chances start when a hardened criminal crosses paths with a precocious little girl who is helped by an angel to change hearts during the holiday season.

recommendations.title: Terrifier 3

recommendations.title: Becky
recommendations.overview: A teenager's weekend at a lake house with her father takes a turn for the worse when a group of convicts wreaks havoc on their lives.

recommendations.title: Paper Lives
recommendations.overview: In the streets of Istanbul, ailing waste warehouse worker Mehmet takes a small boy under his wing and must soon confront his own traumatic childhood.

recommendations.title: Red White & Blue
recommendations.overview: A woman attracts the attention of a psychotic former Army interrogator and an emotionally fragile young man caring for his ailing mother.

recommendations.title: Vai Que Dá Certo
recommendations.overview: 5 friends have a plan to rob a transporter that can change their lives.

recommendations.title: The Lost Daughter
recommendations.overview: A woman's seaside vacation takes a dark turn when her obsession with a young mother forces her to confront secrets from her past.

recommendations.title: In the Land of Women
recommendations.overview: After a bad breakup with his girlfriend leaves him heartbroken, Carter Webb moves to Michigan to take care of his ailing grandmother. Once there, he gets mixed up in the lives of the mother and daughters who live across the street.

recommendations.title: Bambi
recommendations.overview: Bambi's tale unfolds from season to season as the young prince of the forest learns about life, love, and friends.
